public_runtime_policy: public validation uses exact source digests, anchor checks, syntax compilation, and read-only macro projection-loss audit smoke checks; copied projection-loss-audit source is body evidence, not authority to write projection-loss audit receipts, mutate route graphs, update canonical route state, execute live providers, export prompt/operator/provider bodies, inspect browser/HUD live access, inspect private account/session state, or send recipient material
receipt_body_policy: receipts report paths hashes counts and anchor results but never duplicate full source bodies, provider payload bodies, provider response bodies, operator prompt bodies, browser/HUD live-access material, account/session state, cookies, credentials, baseline payload bodies beyond public-safe fixture refs, recipient-send state, or projection-loss audit output bodies
secret_exclusion_boundary: manual baseline private payload bodies beyond public-safe fixture refs
